name: CCELL - Stylo Battery
summary: CCELL - Stylo Battery — a 510 cartridge battery for patients using 510 cartridges.
description: The Stylo delivers consistent heating at controlled temperatures, ensuring smooth vapour sessions with zero burnt flavour and generous, crisp clouds every time. Designed with simplicity in mind, The Stylo includes a handy preheat button, an easy-access voltage slider, and a user-friendly digital screen — ideal for both new and experienced users. Experience flawless sessions with 15-second temp stabilisation that eliminates harsh hits. The digital interface ensures you’re always in control of your perfect draw. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
